message:
fix(down): stop crew member sessions during gt down (gt-hyg)

gt down stopped infrastructure agents (refineries, witnesses, mayor, boot,
deacon, daemon, dolt) but left crew member tmux sessions running. This caused
orphaned crew sessions that continued consuming tokens after shutdown.

Add a crew shutdown phase (Phase 0.6) that enumerates all crew workers across
all rigs and stops their tmux sessions. Crew sessions are always stopped
during gt down, not gated behind --polecats, since they are active worker
sessions.
